ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Work class of the individual (e.g., Private, Self-Employed) */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight, a measure of the population's representation */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest education level achieved */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "income_target" TEXT /* Income target (<=50K or >50K) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region within the US */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, retired) */,
  "has_health_insurance" INTEGER /* Health insurance status */,
  "migration_status" TEXT /* Migration status (e.g., native, immigrant, refugee) */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Disability status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_target FOREIGN KEY ("income_target") REFERENCES income_categories ("income_range"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES educational_levels ("education_level")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., HS-grad, Some-college) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the education level entails */,
  "average_years" INTEGER /* Average years required to complete this level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Industry sector the occupation belongs to */,
  "average_salary" INTEGER /* Average salary for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Average family size for this marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_categories" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income range */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Name of the income range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income category */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user accessing the data (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "data_scope" TEXT /* Scope of data accessed (e.g., regional, national) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
column_names: Work class of the individual (e.g., Private, Self-Employed)
Final weight, a measure of the population's representation
Unique identifier for each education level
Name of the education level (e.g., HS-grad, Some-college)
